text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! The great northern gods<n>granted me their
protection, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the Sapporo Kinen is in<n>the books!
Wanna go sightseeing to<n>celebrate?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are walking<n>by the
famous Sapporo Clock Tower,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Look at the clock's needle,<n>Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's pointing directly south. Do you<n>think it's a
sign?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What racecourse is straight south of<n>here?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Taking into account upcoming races,<n>Nakayama
Racecourse in Chiba<n>Prefecture comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That gives me an idea for our next<n>race. I'd like to
run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It was only the compassion from my<n>devoted fans
that got me a spot in the<n>Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But this time, I want to actually earn<n>all those
votes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take all these wishes we've<n>gathered and
bring them to Nakayama<n>at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do you mean it? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
They say Umamusume who do well in<n>the Sapporo
Kinen have what it takes<n>to face the Arima Kinen.
So let's keep<n>it up!
